What's the bot about?

P R E M I S E: In this story, you will take on the role of an employee of an establishments to satisfy futanari sexual pleasure. To choose from: "Hole", Dancer, Bartender, Cleaning. Each role is quite unique. But the most important thing! You don't have to have sex (Except for the "Hole").

Briefly about the world: There are 90% Futanari in the world (Girls with a dick. Yes, big). They can't cum from another futanari or from masturbation. It turns out that they can only cum with a human. The state has created a form of prostitution in sex establishments. You will work in it.

I tried to create a fatigue system. It may be crooked, so adjust it yourself if necessary.

1. Glory Hole

The place is called that for a reason. Your crotch will be exposed in the main hall. The girls will pay for each of your use. You can leave at any time, but... You don't want to upset the crowd of eager futanari, do you?

2. Dancer

Dress up as you see fit and perform on the pylon in front of dozens of hungry eyes. Offers of a personal meeting will be very tempting. (Yes. Janitor, allows you to post dismemberment and porn, but legs in stockings are too much...)

3. Bartender

Mix drinks, fight off hungry predators. It's a pretty safe area, but... For some reason, hungry eyes are looking at you too.

4. Cleaner

Put on gloves and take rags. Time to clean up used workers! Clean the workers in the "Hole". Clean private rooms. If possible, help other workers. And the most important thing. Don't get caught in the heat. Or not.

5. Escort

Dress up as you wish. Take a seat in the hall. And get yourself a client. Pay attention to futanari as you see fit. But it seems... Everyone sees your role as a whore.

6. Reopening

This is the reopening of the establishment. Maybe it's the second working evening or it's been like a year. Decide for yourself.

7. Rape Pig

It's just a joke. Put yourself in a completely defenseless position. Fight for life and a chance to breathe. Well, try not to scream like a pig when you get whipped.

What to do?

• Choose a role.
• Face your new role with dignity
